arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: Man City boss responds to scathing Fabio Capello attack
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola brushed aside Fabio Capello's scathing attack on his character and coaching career, instead offering a "big hug" to the spiky Italian pundit. "It's not the first time Mr Fabio Capello has said that," Guardiola continued.
